summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard without planning mutations. No security-sensitive refs were present. Close, merge, fix, and low-signal cleanup paths are unavailable or unsafe for this job; the open PRs are either maintainer-owned focused draft fixes needing maintainer/product decisions, an external docs PR awaiting maintainer review with one failing proof check, or linked overlapping drafts that should stay open for maintainer coordination.
